data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. CATCH SOME RAYS is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by 0.8 lengths at this track in a handy 19.07 beating Settle For Less. Winner at his latest appearance in the quickest time on the card. Can continue the winning form. 7. KNEE DEEP filled the minor placings again last time when third (16.69) at this track, making it three straight minors on end. Has a strong record from this draw. Looks well placed here and has the ability. Go well. 3. KURNAI BOLT produced a moderate effort last time when seventh at Sandown over 515m behind Mighty Scar (30.52) in a Grade 5. Better than last start and can bounce back. 2. ALL MUCKED UP won in smart time most recently. Right in the mix.","runners":[1,7,3,2],"exclusive":false}
